Gas Prices Today, June 5: Check fuel latest rates in California, Texas, Florida, New York, and Pennsylvania as National Average sees a dip

regions.why: WTI crude is falling sharply and Saskatchewan prices dropped 10¢ week-over-week, signaling downward momentum. However, you're still 3¢ above the regional low, suggesting further easing is likely in the next 2–3 days as the market adjusts.

regions.why: WTI crude is declining and you're only 3¢/L above recent lows. Downward momentum suggests further drops over the next few days, though retail lag means station prices trail wholesale by 24–48 hours.
